title: Choco-Wolf GUI
description: Brown themed gui with werewolf themed icons
body:
# A dark brown GUI with (were)wolf themed icons. 

How the in game interface looks like
![HUD Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b380f5a785d72e4e35cfb7c7679e51a92b58d3ec.png)


If you have AppleSkin : 
![AppleSkin example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd0ebb918eddfc07f2bce7b897604e18b9d38d98.png)


**These icons are accompanied with a dark brown GUI for the menus!**
